core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Hacker Aesthetics' with 'Swiss Typography'.
Emotion First: The app should feel 'Precise', 'Dangerous', and 'Intelligent'.
Content is King: The Markdown report is the hero. It must look better than a PDF.
Negative Space: Use massive padding (p-8, p-12) to let code breathe.
Contrast: High contrast text (White on Black), subtle borders.

usage.primary: Use for primary CTAs and key brand moments.
usage.accent: Use for 'Success' states, data visualization highlights, and active states.
usage.muted: Use for secondary text, borders, and inactive elements.

visual_enhancers.radius: 0px (Sharp) or 4px (Minimal) - NO PILL SHAPES for cards.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle 'noise' overlay (opacity 0.03) on the background to kill flat colors.

landing_page.structure: Hero on left (col-span-7), 3D/Visual on right (col-span-5). Overlapping elements encouraged.

features: Metadata Sidebar (Right - on large screens only)
Typography: 'Prose' class with 'prose-invert' and custom overrides for code blocks.

shadcn_customization: Dialogs: No rounded corners, raw borders, glassmorphism backdrop.
custom_components: CodeBlock: Uses 'shiki' or 'prism-react-renderer' with a custom 'One Dark Pro' or 'Dracula' theme.
StreamText: A component that handles SSE streaming with a 'blinking cursor' effect.
CreditBadge: A distinct, glowing badge in the header showing user credits.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for text. Use APCA standards.
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels if no text is present.

media.image_strategy: Minimalist. Use generated CSS patterns or SVG illustrations instead of stock photos.
media.logo_handling: Monochrome logos (white/gray) to fit the dark theme.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text (readability issues).
Do NOT center align the app container.
Ensure the 'Report View' is printer-friendly (media print styles).
instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: `npm install framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge @radix-ui/react-slot react-markdown remark-gfm rehype-highlight @tsparticles/react @tsparticles/slim`.
Configure Tailwind with the colors provided in this JSON.
Set up the font imports in `index.css`.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Dashboard.
Create a 'StreamingMarkdown' component that accepts a stream of text and renders it incrementally.
Ensure the 'Credit Purchase' flow uses a clear, high-contrast pricing card.
